searchHelp: Currently covers champions and augments, including known aliases.
searchEmpty: No matching results. Try a champion name, alias, or augment name.
contextHelp: Cache refreshes hourly. Only verifiable public ARAM data is available.
rankingError: Ranking is unavailable. Please try again.
rankingEmpty: No matching data. Clear filters or try another query.
homeDescription: Before the game starts, verify high-sample, explainable champion and augment conclusions for the current patch.
augmentDescription: Augments are only shown in the ARAM context; rankings, samples, and details all use the same patch data.
pageNotFound: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
noComboAvailable: No combo recommendations for this champion. Check base stats first.
searchBuildPrompt: Search a champion to view recommended builds. Currently covers Summoner's Rift and ARAM.
aramOnlyData: Only verifiable public ARAM data is available.
summonersRiftDesc: Champions, roles, runes, items, matchups, and builds.
aramDesc: Balance adjustments, augments, items, skills, and combos.
arenaDesc: Duo combinations, augments, items, and synergy. Coming soon.
noPatches: No patch data available. Check back later.
checkNetworkRetry: Check your network and retry. Return home to explore other data if the issue persists.
dataNotFound: This data could not be found.
linkExpiredDesc: The link may be outdated, or the current patch has no matching entity. Return home to search champions or augments.
maintenancePending: Pending backend role verification, audit logging, and write API integration. No modifications can be submitted.
maintenanceRequired: Required: identity sessions, role permissions, entity read/write, audit logging, and error reporting.
authServicePending: Executable login buttons will appear after OAuth callbacks, session APIs, and permission checks are connected.
qqLoginDesc: For CN player binding and data sync. Enabled after QQ Connect OAuth 2.0 integration.
riotLoginDesc: For international player binding and data sync. Enabled after Riot Sign On integration.
overviewDesc: Data coverage, crawl status, cache hit rate, and system health.
sourceDesc: Manage upstream data source connections, refresh frequency, and fallback strategy.
regionDesc: Regional data availability, latency, and sampling rate.
versionDesc: Manage data version lifecycle, activation, and archival.
championMgmtDesc: Maintain champion base info, aliases, and localized data.
augmentMgmtDesc: Maintain augment qualities, descriptions, and mode associations.
itemMgmtDesc: Maintain item categories, icons, and patch changes.
userRolesDesc: Manage admin users, role permissions, and operation audit.
patchPersistDesc: Preferred patch is persisted locally and synced with the context selector.
qqBindDesc: Bind CN account after OAuth callback integration.
riotBindDesc: Bind international account after Riot Sign On integration.
adminReadonly: Admin routes are established. All maintenance sections are read-only until permission checks and write APIs are connected.
profileDesc: Version preferences are persisted locally. Account identity and QQ/Riot binding require backend authorization.
comboResearchDesc: Combination research does not use layered modals. Select a champion first — their detail page shows skill orders, boots, items, and augment synergy data from the current patch.
aboutDesc: Summoner Atlas is an ARAM data decision platform: dense, traceable patch data to help players find champions and augments worth trying.
buildsDesc: Select a champion to explore optimal builds on the current patch.
itemsDesc: High-sample item win rates and pick rates on the current patch.
runesDesc: High-sample rune win rates and pick rates on the current patch.
patchesDesc: Patch notes, data update timeline, and patch-over-patch changes.
metaDesc: Champion strength shifts, build trends, and regional differences on the current patch.
loginDesc: Authorization service pending OAuth callback and session API integration.
augmentCrosstableHint: Per-champion crosstables are not yet available. Below are high-sample champion entries from the same patch — view details for their combo data.
noPatchesData: No patch data available. Check back later.
compareDesc: All metrics are fixed to the current public sample and ARAM patch; data from different modes or regions is not mixed.
noCompareData: Not enough champion data available for comparison.
supportDesc: Data comes from public RESG APIs and CommunityDragon. League of Legends and related materials belong to Riot Games; this project is not affiliated with or endorsed by Riot Games.
methodologyDesc: We present win rate and matches together: larger samples mean more stable conclusions; low-sample high win rates are explicitly downgraded.
versionFixedDesc: Every page identifies its data version. Comparisons are only valid within the same patch, mode, and filter conditions.
sampleTierDesc: 5,000+ matches = high confidence; 1,000-4,999 = medium; fewer samples are marked as limited.
publiclyVerifiableDesc: Champion and augment stats come from public APIs; names and icons use CommunityDragon resources.
tftDesc: Compositions, item combos, and augment tech. Coming soon.
notReplaceJudgmentDesc: Data describes past samples, not future outcomes. Team composition, player skill, and game timing still affect actual results.
missingInActionDesc: We've combed the perimeter. The page you're looking for has vanished into the void. It's clean... too clean.
internalSystemFailureDesc: ATLAS Core suffered an internal fault. Unit 734 is currently attempting to fix the hyper-drive. Please remain calm.
